title: サイレンススズカ、覚醒④

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's October. Propelled by the glow of the
limelight and high expectations, a certain
Umamusume breaks into a frenzied run.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What incredible speed! Silence Suzuka pulls even
further away from the pack with her runaway
style!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Is it even safe runnin' that fast?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's made it past the giant zelkova tree, but the
other runners are hot on her trail...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
But no! She ramps up her speed even more on the
straight! No one can close the gap!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: This is amazing! Go, Suzuka! Go, go, gooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka holds the lead all the way to the
finish line! A fitting run for the Otherworldly
Front-Runner!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Since that trip to Hong Kong, all her races have
been incredible as all get-out! She's the cream of
the Umamusume crop, I tell ya what!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a real strength to her running, but that's
not all. Her style captures the hearts of those who
witness it and refuses to let go.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Suzuka's off to the winner's circle!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna give her a big ol' victory squeeze!
C'mon, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, we can't even get to the
sidelines—the swarm of Suzuka's celebrating fans
is too vast to push through.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once again, I'm reminded of the hold that Silence
Suzuka has on everyone's hearts.
